source.name: Chapter 1.4: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - order of collect steps
source.instructions: **Why does the order of `collect:` steps in a flow matter?**

answers.answer: It doesn't; Rasa ignores the order
The order is the order in which the bot will ask the user for each value
Only the first collect step runs
The order must match the alphabetical order of slot names

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT explain why collect step order matters
source.guidance: The order of `collect:` steps is the order in which the bot prompts for each slot value.
